title: Drypetes henriquesii
taxonomy: Drypetes henriquesii is classified under the family Putranjivaceae and order Malpighiales. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and phylum Angiospermophyta. The species is further grouped into the class Magnoliopsida and the order's larger group, clade Rosidae. Its classification places it within the broader plant clade, eudicots. This classification highlights its evolutionary relationships with other plant species.
